name: JJtorio
title: JJtorio
author: JJ
description: JJtorio is a work-in-progress overhaul aiming to turn Factorio 2.0 into an endless, procedurally generated universe. Today: a light, faster early game and procedurally generated planets, with the rocket silo gated behind a mature base. Planned: an early game restructured so vanilla blueprints don't just paste in, reaching orbit and an original orbital science tier, and planets that each force a different way to build. Standalone - not compatible with Space Age or Space Exploration. Early work in progress. Community feedback welcome: email jjtmcmultiversal@gmail.com with the subject 'JJtorio'.
